name: Madan Mahal Fort
description: A 12th-century military outpost perched on a massive granite boulder, offering panoramic views of Jabalpur and a glimpse into Gond history.
history: Built by the Gond ruler Raja Madan Singh. It is famous for the 'Balancing Rock' located nearby, which survived a major earthquake in 1997.
famousFor: Balancing Rock and panoramic city views.
